## checklist

- [ ] tests added / updated
- [ ] docs updated if public api changed
- [ ] changelog entry under `## [unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] no new comments that explain *what* (only *why*)
- [ ] zk circuit untouched, OR additional review requested
